channel.title: Remio Host for Windows
channel.description: Official WinSparkle appcast for Remio Host (Windows)

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
Your PC, anywhere. Now smoother than ever.

Remio Host 1.1.0 is our biggest Windows update yet — faster connections, calmer streams, and a streaming engine you can finally feel.

What's new

  • A stream that just flows — smoother frame pacing, fewer hiccups when the network blips, and a renderer that gracefully recovers from latency spikes.
  • One-click pairing — tightened signaling handshake, smarter reconnect, and a UI that stays in sync even when Wi-Fi drops.
  • Type, click, command — new TextField focus monitor makes your iPad keyboard and trackpad feel native.
  • Drag-and-drop file transfer — finally first-class on the Windows host.
  • Built like a service — runs as a true Windows Service, survives reboots, log-outs, and user switching.
  • Calmer diagnostics — rebuilt streaming logger, easier to read, easier to debug.

Plus countless little fixes nobody asked for, but everybody wanted. Update now and feel the difference.

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Remio Host for Windows — first release

Native Windows build of Remio Host with GPU-accelerated capture, multi-monitor support, gamepad passthrough, and auto-update via WinSparkle.
